context.setting: Working on laptop with laptop on Right

episode_text:
day=1; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Working on laptop with laptop on Right; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=perception; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop or tablet positioned to the user's right AND neutral affect AND foods without sauces or dips THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to keep the robot from blocking the right-side workspace.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: Inside-mouth transfer is the stable default because the user cannot lean forward due to lack of trunk control, making outside-mouth transfer physically unsuitable.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer THEN not applicable BECAUSE outside-mouth distance only applies to outside-mouth transfer, which is not physically suitable for this user.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF neutral affect AND working on a laptop on the right AND foods without sauces or dips THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected a low-effort, highly automated interaction style in this observed context. Button input is physically incompatible with the user's severe upper-limb paralysis.

IF neutral affect AND working on a laptop on the right AND foods without sauces or dips THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected the same low-effort automated readiness detection for drinking. Button input is physically incompatible with the user's severe upper-limb paralysis.

IF neutral affect AND working on a laptop on the right AND foods without sauces or dips THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user selected the same low-effort automated readiness detection for mouth wiping. Button input is physically incompatible with the user's severe upper-limb paralysis.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF working on a laptop on the right AND neutral affect AND foods without sauces or dips THEN no BECAUSE the user prioritized speed and reduced interruption over extra retraction, despite also wanting right-side occlusion minimized.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF foods include a dip or sauce such as ketchup AND working on a laptop on the right AND neutral affect THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user explicitly avoided dipping in the observed meal, consistent with reducing mess while working.
